summary: Raw recording of an official state-arrival honor-guard ceremony at the Great Hall of the People in Beijing: Trump stands on a dais as a Chinese military band plays, then he and Xi Jinping walk the red carpet inspecting assembled troops while children wave U.S. and Chinese flags and flowers. Steady wide static-camera pool footage with no title cards, graphics, stylized cutting, or genre treatment; the audio is the live ceremonial band (visible brass section), i.e. ambient ceremony sound rather than a produced music track, consistent with the low music_score. This is an event/ceremony recording, out of scope for youth-appeal produced content.
